name: Garage Works
short_description: Garage Works is a sandbox type car simulation game where all kinds of handling and performance affecting parts can be changed as well as tested on road or on track.
detailed_description:
Garage Works is a car restoration and racing game where your journey starts in your own garage. Browse through used car ads on your laptop to find the perfect project car. If funds are low, you can take on delivery job to earn some extra cash or head to the junkyard with your truck or rental car, where you'll find damaged cars at a bargain, but they might need a lot of work.

Once you’ve purchased a car, you can either transport it to your garage with your truck or have it delivered. From there, the real work begins—buy new parts, renovate, and give life back into these vehicles.

The choice is yours: sell your restored cars for a quick profit, or keep them, upgrade them, and take them to the track to compete in races.

What can you do with your car:

- change parts, there's around 150 to 200 on each car

- upgrade with high performance parts

- cruise around the island

- participate in racing competitions

- sell and buy another one

Some parts wear out over time and they should be changed frequently, but don't let this stop you from racing, that's why this is Garage Works!
